raw_consumer_statement:
Attended a timeshare exit presentation. A Barclays RCI credit card account was opened and a charge of {$11000.00} posted on XX/XX/XXXX XXXX  by XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX, MO XXXX. 
I send a certified letter to opt-out. 
I talked to XXXX XXXX, Customer Support for the processing center and she acknowledged the error and receipt of the opt-out letter. She then wanted to know if we wanted a check mailed or a credit back to the credit card. We responded by telling her to credit the credit card. She said she would do that but needed a document-sign form. She was to send this to us. We have not received the form. We have not received any further response or communication.
